title: Cargo Depot Completions
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN UpdateType = 'Collect' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pickups, SUM(CASE WHEN UpdateType = 'Deliver' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deliveries FROM CargoDepot WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} wing cargo depot event(s) during the report period: {deliveries} delivery(s) and {pickups} pickup(s). Wing cargo depot missions require coordination between multiple pilots to move large quantities of goods — they contribute directly to faction influence and community goals.
details.help: CargoDepot fires on both collect and deliver phases of a wing cargo mission. total drives the title as the full activity count.

tagLines: Wing cargo depot participation logged. Coordinated logistics contributions noted in the faction record.
Someone had to move all that cargo. You and your wing made sure it happened.
Wing logistics missions are the unsung backbone of faction warfare. The numbers prove you showed up.
